title: How AI Will Help People Instead of Taking Their Jobs Away
description: Aryan Singh Vashista anjukumariartandcraft@gmail.com In the recent past, there has been much talk about the concept of artificial intelligence and how it will take over human jobs. However, looking back on the history of how technology has evolved over the years, we can get a better understanding of how artificial intelligence will not only not take our jobs, but also help us. The main idea behind the concept of artificial intelligence is to help people, not replace them. In most […]
content:

title: Off-Grid Data Centers Will Help Protect Ratepayers, But Codifying ARC-ES Would Do Even More
description: With America’s 250th birthday right around the corner on July 4, it doesn’t require artificial intelligence to know that the biggest gift of all would be a guarantee of energy security and independence for ourselves, our children and generations to come.

title: Microsoft to invest $10 bil for Japan AI data centers
description: Microsoft said Friday it will invest $10 billion in Japan over the next four years to build artificial intelligence data centers and related infrastructure. Power-hungry data centers -- warehouse-like facilities that power AI tools from chatbots to image generators -- are springing up worldwide, and the sector is growing particularly…

title: Musk asks SpaceX IPO banks to buy Grok AI subscriptions, NYT reports
description: Elon Musk is requiring banks and other advisers working on SpaceX’s planned IPO to buy subscriptions to Grok, his artificial intelligence chatbot, the New York Times reported on Friday, citing people familiar with the matter.
content:

title: China moves to regulate digital humans, bans addictive services for children
description: The draft regulations would ​also ban the use of other people's personal information to create digital humans without ​consent, or using virtual humans to bypass identity verification systems, reflecting Beijing's efforts to maintain control in the face of advances in artificial intelligence.
